case_title: LARRY BUCK VS. JANA BARSTEN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED AUG-27-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARSTEN, KIRA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF' , PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BARSTEN, JANA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BUCK, LARRY $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
